name: AI Suite Também
description: Gere respostas com IA para comentários do YouTube Studio

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://*.puter.com wss://*.puter.com https://*.googleapis.com https://www.youtube.com https://*.youtube.com; frame-src 'self' https://*.puter.com;
